description.value: CoolBitX, founded in 2014, develops the CoolWallet line of hardware wallets and a companion mobile app. Its products include the CoolWallet Pro, a credit-card-sized Bluetooth device, the entry-level CoolWallet Go and the CoolWallet S. The self-custodial CoolWallet app supports thousands of cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, with staking and trading tools.
